case_title: VICTOR GUERRERO VS. BLS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES USA, INC. A DELAWARE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BLS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES USA, INC. A DELAWARE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES USA, INC. A DELAWARE COMPANY $1,560.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,785.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
